Meningococcal Disease Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a meningococcal disease test? 
Meningococcal disease is the name for any infection caused by meningococcal bacteria Â (called Neisseria meningitidis ). Meningococcal disease tests look for these bacteria in your blood or cerebrospinal fluid (CSF), the fluid in spaces around your brain and spinal cord.
